title: phyllanthus lacteus
intro: Phyllanthus lacteus, also known as the white milk leaf plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its ability to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Phyllanthus lacteus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support liver function, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
